title: SK17 9RZ, Mastermelt Refining Services Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/BL1312IE/V015
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Mastermelt Refining Services Limited Installation name: Staden Lane Industrial Estate Permit number: EPR/BL1312IE/V015  "
